1.content: Who do we start with?
1.title: Let's get started

info.brief_description: Follow the babies from Rugrats in their adventures in potty training!
info.description:
A previously deleted interactive story brought back for fans of Rugrats. Join the babies in their adventures in potty-training.

Rules:

1. Keep each chapter clean.
2. Diaper changes are allowed.
3. No weight gain.
4. Pooping in the diaper or training toilet is one of the main focuses.
5. Have fun!
